name: Kickert School Bus Lines
fmcsa_address: 20575 Torrence Avenue, Lynwood, IL 60411 (mailing: 2100 Clearwater Dr Suite 250, Oak Brook, IL 60523)
officers: Cook-Illinois Corporation (parent, John Benish family); founded 1915 by Richard Kickert
registry_source: Illinois Secretary of State business entity (corp name KICKERT BUS LINES INC / KICKERT SCHOOL BUS LINE INC); confirmed via FMCSA SAFER and Cook-Illinois corporate site
notes: Input address (137 Camelot Way, Bolingbrook) is a satellite yard; the registered FMCSA carrier is KICKERT BUS LINES INC headquartered in Lynwood, IL with mailing at Cook-Illinois HQ in Oak Brook. A second related USDOT 158777 (KICKERT SCHOOL BUS LINES INC) exists but is inactive per third-party SAFER aggregators. Founded 1915 by Richard Kickert; flagship subsidiary of Cook-Illinois Corp. Per HF Chronicle (Feb 2026), Kickert was sold to First Student in early 2026, so ownership has changed but operating status remains active under FMCSA. Could not retrieve exact Illinois SOS file number / inc date because IL SOS search portal blocks WebFetch.

name: Mid Placer Transportation
officers: Joint Powers Authority of Ackerman Elementary, Alta-Dutch Flat, Colfax Elementary, Loomis Union, and Placer Union High school districts
registry_source: California Department of Education school directory (CDS 31402790000000) and Mid-Placer agency website; not a private corporation registered with CA SOS
notes: Carrier is a public Joint Powers Authority (JPA), not a private corporation. Legal name in FMCSA SAFER is 'MID-PLACER PUBLIC SCHOOLS' at the exact input address (13121 Bill Francis Dr, Auburn, CA 95603). Formed 1979 under California Government Code Title 1, Div 7, Ch 5 Art 1 (Joint Exercise of Power Act). No CA SOS corporate filing because public-agency JPAs are listed via CDE rather than SOS. Probably NOT a Summit tuck-in candidate because it is a publicly-owned JPA, not a sellable private company.

name: Dee Bus
officers: Robert Dee (President), Eileen Dee (Secretary), Sandra Martin (Treasurer), Linda MacDonald (Director), George Dee (Agent)
registry_source: Massachusetts Secretary of the Commonwealth Corporations Division (entity DEE BUS SERVICE INC, MA ID 043054564) via OpenCorporates / SOC public records
notes: Input lists Littleton, MA at 56 King St (operating yard / former address) but registered corporate and FMCSA address is 33 Great Rd, Shirley, MA 01464. Business dates to 1946 as a taxi by Leo Dee; school bus operations expanded under son George Dee; current MA corporation incorporated 5/16/1989. Fleet of ~370 power units is exceptionally large for the carrier name and likely includes the company's full school + special-needs fleet across multiple MA districts.

name: Westonka Bus Svc
fmcsa_address: 2550 50th St West, Webster, MN 55088 (operating yard at 5910 Sunnyfield Rd E, Mound/Minnetrista, MN 55364)
fmcsa_status: active (not authorized for interstate for-hire); FMCSA flags 'Carrier Registration Information Outdated' and VMT outdated as of June 2026
officers: Operated under 4.0 School Services umbrella (Saint Peter, MN); parent originated as Prairie Bus Service in 1994
entity_status: active (per MN SOS, unable to confirm exact filing details via WebFetch)
registry_source: Minnesota Secretary of State Business Filings (legal entity '4 POINT 0 SCHOOL OF MOUND INC' d/b/a 'Westonka Bus Service') - MN SOS portal blocked WebFetch; corroborated via FMCSA SAFER and fourpointo.com
notes: Westonka Bus Service is a DBA of 4 POINT 0 SCHOOL OF MOUND INC, USDOT 1048727. The 4.0 School Services platform (Saint Peter, MN) operates this and several sister entities (4 POINT 0 SCHOOL SERVICES OF ST PETER INC USDOT 1765148, 4 POINT 0 SCHOOL SERVICES OF FLOODWOOD INC USDOT 3213307). 4.0 School Services traces back to Prairie Bus Service founded 1994. The FMCSA MCS-150 form was last filed 01/31/2007, so FMCSA fleet count of 51 is dated; current fleet may differ. MN SOS exact incorporation date and officer list could not be confirmed because the MN SOS portal returned errors / blocked WebFetch.

name: Harlows School Bus Svc Inc-Mt
fmcsa_address: 1021 S 23rd Street Suite A, Bismarck, ND 58504
officers: Harlow Hageness (founder, 1973); family-owned holding company headquartered in Bismarck, ND
registry_source: Montana Secretary of State business entity filing F017695 (HARLOW'S SCHOOL BUS SERVICE, INC.) - corroborated via b2bhint
notes: Input record lists Garden Valley, ID (1069 Banks Lowman Rd) as an operating yard / Idaho location; the FMCSA registrant and Montana SOS entity are headquartered at 1021 S 23rd St Suite A, Bismarck, ND. Parent company (Harlow's School Bus Service) was founded 1973 by Harlow Hageness; this Montana-organized entity was incorporated 12/23/1985, MT file F017695, status Active-Good Standing. Harlow's operates ~30 locations across ND, SD, MT, ID, WA. Idaho-specific entity may also exist separately - SAFER's HARLOW'S BUS SERVICE INC (USDOT 321336) and HARLOWS SCHOOL BUS SERVICE INC (USDOT 1662560) are related sister entities. Match used 'Inc-Mt' suffix in input name to identify the Montana entity (USDOT 703193).
